MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- SHERRY GALAHAN, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
DAVID BEAUMONT, WITNESS FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PAUL YEE OF THE LAW FIRM OF BRIAN MCCLELLAN, TEL. NO. (510) 457-9923 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; WITNESS FOR THE PLAINTIFF DAVID BEAUMONT WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT MARK CENTONI'S Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Serve Summons And Complaint IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR MR. CENTORI TO FILE WITHIN 10 DAYS A RESPONSIVE PLEADING OR A MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
